account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [the Yuno Dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (MAX 64; MIN 36).

description.description: The description of the payment link (MAX 255; MIN 3).

merchant_order_id.description: Identification of the payment link transaction defined by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 3).

amount.description: Specifies the payment amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](doc:country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

capture.description: Decides whether to authorize the payment or capture it. Authorizing a card payment allows you to reserve funds in a customer's bank account. If not set, true by default.

type.description: The type of the payment link.

status.description: The status of the payment link.

payments_number.description: Number of payments associated with this link.

taxes.description: Specifies the payment taxes list. **Only available for COL**.

type.description: Type of the tax.

tax_base.description: The amount base to apply the tax defined.

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (UUID | MAX 36; MIN 36).

merchant_customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer in the external merchant (MAX 255; MIN 3).

gender.description: The customer's gender (MAX 2; MIN 1; (M=Male/F=Female/NA=Not applicable/NK=Not Known)).

date_of_birth.description: The customer's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (Length: 10).

document.description: Specifies the customer's document object, including its number and type.

phone.description: Specifies the customer's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 5; MIN 1). Check the [country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

billing_address.description: Specifies the customer's billing address object.

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

shipping_address.description: Specifies the customer's shipping address object.

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

ip_address.description: Specifies the customer's IP address (MAX 45; MIN 1).

additional_data.description: Specifies the additional_data object. This object is not mandatory. However, if you send this information, the payment experience will be enhanced for your user.

shipping_amount.description: The shipping amount of the order (multiple of 0.0001)

fee_amount.description: The fee amount of the order (multiple of 0.0001)

items.description: Specifies the items array of object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item (MAX 255; MIN 1).

name.description: The name of the item (MAX 255; MIN 3).

unit_amount.description: The unit amount of the item (multiple of 0.0001).

category.description: The category of the item. Check the Item category reference.

brand.description: The brand of the item (MAX 255; MIN 1).

sku_code.description: The stock keeping unit (SKU) of the item (MAX 255; MIN 1).

manufacture_part_number.description: The manufacture part number of the item (MAX 255; MIN 1).

departure_datetime.description: The departure date and time in UTC time (ISO 8601, MAX 27; MIN 27).

arrival_airport.description: IATA airport code. See http://www.iata.org (MAX 3; MIN 3).

carrier_code.description: IATA carrier code. See http://www.iata.org (MAX 2; MIN 2).

flight_number.description: The flight number assigned by the airline carrier (MAX 5; MIN 1).

fare_basis_code.description: Code base rate provides specific information on the fare in addition to the class service, both required for booking (MAX 15; MIN 1).

fare_class_code.description: The fare class code of the airline (MAX 3; MIN 1). The values can be letters (A-Z) but may vary depending on the airline's definition. Check the [Airline information reference](airline-information#fare-class-code).

base_fare.description: The transaction amount, excluding taxes and fees, the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

base_fare_currency.description: The currency used for the base fare amount (MAX 3; MIN 3; [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)).

stopover_code.description: 1-letter code that indicates whether the passenger is allowed to make a stopover. Only two types of characters are allowed: O: Stopover allowed (the letter “O”, not zero) / X: Stopover not allowed. (MAX 1; MIN 1).

seller_details.description: Specifies the seller's details object. Only mandatory for PSPs with sub_merchant account information.

industry.description: The seller's industry (MAX 255; MIN 3; Industry category reference).

document.description: Specifies the document object of the seller.

phone.description: Specifies the seller's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 5; MIN 1).  Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

callback_url.description: URL to redirect the customer after the payment (MAX 256).

one_time_use.description: `true` allows only one use, `false` multiple payments

availability.description: The availability object. Refers to the Payment Link expiration date.

start_at.description: Start of the validity period of the payment link.

finish_at.description: End of the validity period of the payment link.

payment_method_types.description: The list of types of payment methods that customers can use. Check the available payment methods on [Payment type](ref:payment-type-list). If no value is passed, Yuno will display the payment methods defined in the dashboard.

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

vault_on_success.description: Flag to enroll the card after a successful payment

}

availability.description: The availability object. Refers to the Payment Link expiration date.

start_at.description: Start of the validity period of the payment link.

finish_at.description: End of the validity period of the payment link.

installments_options.description: Define the available payment plans (MAX 50; MIN 1).

split_payment_methods.description: Allows you to split the payment with several payment methods.

payment_method_types.description: The list of types of payment methods that customers can use. If no value is passed, Yuno will display the payment methods defined in the dashboard.

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (MAX 64 ; MIN 36).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account (MAX 64; MIN 36).

description.description: The description of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: Country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

sub_status.description: It is a complement to the status information.

merchant_order_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer's order (MAX 255; MIN 3).

created_at.description: The date and time when the payment was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time of last update for the payment.

amount.description: Specifies the payment amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

checkout.description: Specifies the checkout object. This object is not mandatory for back to back payments. Required when WORKFLOW is defined as CHECKOUT or is not sent. Not required for DIRECT payments.

session.description: The checkout session has been created for the payment (MAX 64; MIN 36).

sdk_action_required.description: Defines if the payment is asynchronous and requires additional steps based on a request to the SDK.

vaulted_token.description: The vaulted_token represents a securely stored payment_method associated with a previous transaction. When utilizing a vaulted_token for creating a payment, there is no need to send an additional token; it can be set as null (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

type.description: Payment method type. Mandatory for DIRECT or REDIRECT workflow. Required when integrating wallets, even when using the SDK.

vault_on_success.description: Flag to enroll the card after a successful payment.

token.description: The one time use payment method token provided by Yuno sdk. If a payment is created using a token, it is not necessary to send a vaulted_token as well, it can be defined as null. Not necessary for back to back payments (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

payment_method_detail.description: Specifies the payment method detail object, which provides details of the different transaction category types that are part of the payment method object.

card.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using a card.

verify.description: Using amount = 0 and verify = true, you can verify the user's card without authorizing a real amount.

capture.description: Decides whether to authorize the payment or capture it. Authorizing a card payment allows you to reserve funds in a customer's bank account.

first_installments_deferral.description: Number of months to wait to debit the first installment.

installments_amount.description: The installment amount includes interests associated with the installment and the information is defined by the provider.

soft_descriptor.description: The descriptor passed per transaction to out platform. It will be presented on the customer's physical bank statement (MAX 15; MIN 0).

retrieval_reference_number.description: The unique identifier assigned by an acquirer to an authorization.

voucher.description: The unique identifier of the payment receipt assigned by the issuing bank for a card transaction. This field is empty if the gateway does not provide information about the transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3).

card_data.description: Specifies the details of the card.

holder_name.description: Card holder's full name as it appears on the card (MAX 26; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

iin.description: The issuer identification number (IIN) refers to the first few digits of the payment card number issued by a financial institution (MAX 8; MIN 6).

lfd.description: The last four digits of the card (MAX 4; MIN 4).

number_length.description: The length of the card's number (MAX 19; MIN 8).

security_code_length.description: The length of the card's security code (MAX 4; MIN 3).

issuer_code.description: The card's issuer identification code (MAX 255; MIN 3).

category.description: The category of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

type.description: The type of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

three_d_secure.description: Specifies the details of the 3DS Transaction.

three_d_secure_setup_id.description: Setup ID obteined for the 3DS Direct flow.

version.description: Refers to the protocol version of the EMV 3-D Secure

electronic_commerce_indicator.description: This field must be completed with the result of the ECI field provided by the 3d Secure service. The Electronic Commerce Indicator (ECI) informs the card issuer if the transaction was protected by a security protocol like VbV or MCSC. It is mandated by Visa and MasterCard that all 3-D Secure transactions have this value populated in the authorization request. (Min: 0, max: 2).

cryptogram.description: This field must be completed with the result of the cryptogram field provided by the 3DSecure service. In Visa transactions, it represents the Cardholder Authentication Verification Value (CAVV), a cryptographic value generated by the Issuer as evidence of payment authentication during online purchase to qualify for chargeback protection. MasterCard transactions have a similar value called Accountholder Authentication Value (AAV) or the Universal Cardholder Authentication Field (UCAF). When submitting a transaction for authorization, the merchant must include the CAVV or AAV/UCAF to demonstrate that the cardholder has been authenticated. It is typically base64-encoded. (Min: 0, Max: 40).

transaction_id.description: For 3DS v1: This is the Unique Transaction Identifier. It is automatically generated by the MPI. It is typically 28 bytes in length and base64-encoded. Is commonly referred to as XID. (Min: 0, Max: 40). For 3DS v2: Universally unique transaction identifier assigned by the DS to identify a single transaction. (Min: 36, Max:36).

directory_server_transaction_id.description: Transaction ID generated by the Mastercard directory server during authentication (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bnpl.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL).

provider_image.description: The provider's URL to their logo (MAX 255; MIN 3).

redirect_url.description: The URL with the full version of the ticket in case you want to redirect your customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

customer_data.description: Specifies the details of the customer.

username.description: Customer's username in the provider platform (MAX 32, MIN 8).

tax_id.description: The customer's tax identifier number (MAX 32, MIN 8).

type.description: The credit's type (MAX 255; MIN 3).

role.description: The customer's role in the company (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_transfer.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using bank transfer.

provider_image.description: The provider's URL to their logo (MAX 255; MIN 3).

account_type.description: Type of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_name.description: Name of the bank associated with the account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_name.description: The name of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_account.description: The number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_account_2.description: The secondary number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_document_type.description: Document type of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_document.description: Document number of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

payment_instruction.description: Payments instructions related to the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

provider_id.description: The id of the provider that processed the transaction.

payment_method.description: Specifies the payment method details used in the transaction.

vaulted_token.description: The vaulted_token represents a securely stored payment_method associated with a previous transaction. When utilizing a vaulted_token for creating a payment, there is no need to send an additional token; it can be set as null (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

type.description: Payment method type. Mandatory for DIRECT or REDIRECT workflow. Required when integrating wallets, even when using the SDK.

vault_on_success.description: Flag to enroll the card after a successful payment.

token.description: The one time use payment method token provided by Yuno sdk. If a payment is created using a token, it is not necessary to send a vaulted_token as well, it can be defined as null. Not necessary for back to back payments (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

payment_method_detail.description: Specifies the payment method detail object, which provides details of the different transaction category types that are part of the payment method object.

card.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using a card.

verify.description: Using amount = 0 and verify = true, you can verify the user's card without authorizing a real amount.

capture.description: Decides whether to authorize the payment or capture it. Authorizing a card payment allows you to reserve funds in a customer's bank account.

first_installments_deferral.description: Number of months to wait to debit the first installment.

installments_amount.description: The installment amount includes interests associated with the installment and the information is defined by the provider.

soft_descriptor.description: The descriptor passed per transaction to out platform. It will be presented on the customer's physical bank statement (MAX 15; MIN 0).

retrieval_reference_number.description: The unique identifier assigned by an acquirer to an authorization.

voucher.description: The unique identifier of the payment receipt assigned by the issuing bank for a card transaction. This field is empty if the gateway does not provide information about the transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3).

card_data.description: Specifies the details of the card.

holder_name.description: Card holder's full name as it appears on the card (MAX 26; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

iin.description: The issuer identification number (IIN) refers to the first few digits of the payment card number issued by a financial institution (MAX 8; MIN 6).

lfd.description: The last four digits of the card (MAX 4; MIN 4).

number_length.description: The length of the card's number (MAX 19; MIN 8).

security_code_length.description: The length of the card's security code (MAX 4; MIN 3).

issuer_code.description: The card's issuer identification code (MAX 255; MIN 3).

category.description: The category of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

type.description: The type of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

three_d_secure.description: Specifies the details of the 3DS Transaction.

three_d_secure_setup_id.description: Setup ID obteined for the 3DS Direct flow.

version.description: Refers to the protocol version of the EMV 3-D Secure

electronic_commerce_indicator.description: This field must be completed with the result of the ECI field provided by the 3d Secure service. The Electronic Commerce Indicator (ECI) informs the card issuer if the transaction was protected by a security protocol like VbV or MCSC. It is mandated by Visa and MasterCard that all 3-D Secure transactions have this value populated in the authorization request. (Min: 0, max: 2).

cryptogram.description: This field must be completed with the result of the cryptogram field provided by the 3DSecure service. In Visa transactions, it represents the Cardholder Authentication Verification Value (CAVV), a cryptographic value generated by the Issuer as evidence of payment authentication during online purchase to qualify for chargeback protection. MasterCard transactions have a similar value called Accountholder Authentication Value (AAV) or the Universal Cardholder Authentication Field (UCAF). When submitting a transaction for authorization, the merchant must include the CAVV or AAV/UCAF to demonstrate that the cardholder has been authenticated. It is typically base64-encoded. (Min: 0, Max: 40).

transaction_id.description: For 3DS v1: This is the Unique Transaction Identifier. It is automatically generated by the MPI. It is typically 28 bytes in length and base64-encoded. Is commonly referred to as XID. (Min: 0, Max: 40). For 3DS v2: Universally unique transaction identifier assigned by the DS to identify a single transaction. (Min: 36, Max:36).

directory_server_transaction_id.description: Transaction ID generated by the Mastercard directory server during authentication (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bnpl.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL).

provider_image.description: The provider's URL to their logo (MAX 255; MIN 3).

redirect_url.description: The URL with the full version of the ticket in case you want to redirect your customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

customer_data.description: Specifies the details of the customer.

username.description: Customer's username in the provider platform (MAX 32, MIN 8).

tax_id.description: The customer's tax identifier number (MAX 32, MIN 8).

type.description: The credit's type (MAX 255; MIN 3).

role.description: The customer's role in the company (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_transfer.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using bank transfer.

provider_image.description: The provider's URL to their logo (MAX 255; MIN 3).

account_type.description: Type of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_name.description: Name of the bank associated with the account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_name.description: The name of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_account.description: The number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_account_2.description: The secondary number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_document_type.description: Document type of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

beneficiary_document.description: Document number of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

payment_instruction.description: Payments instructions related to the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

redirect_url.description: The URL with the full version of the ticket in case you want to redirect

wallet.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using a wallet.

verify.description: Using amount = 0 and verify = true, you can verify the user's card without authorizing a real amount.

capture.description: Decides whether to authorize the payment or capture it. Authorizing a card payment allows you to reserve funds in a customer's bank account.

payment_method_id.description: The user's payment method used in their wallet.

payment_method_detail.description: The payment method's detail used in their wallet.

date_of_expiration.description: Expiration date for an offline payment method.

money_release_date.description: Date in which the money from the provider will be available to use.

ticket.description: Specifies the details of the payment method when using ticket.

type.description: The ticket's type.

date_of_expiration.description: The ticket's expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD.

redirect_url.description: The URL with the full version of the ticket.

issuer_code.description: The card's issuer identification code (MAX 255; MIN 3).

category.description: The category of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

type.description: The type of the card's issuer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

response_code.description: The code that represents the response of the te outcome of the transaction.

reason.description: The reason for the transaction. Applies to secondary transactions, such as refunds or captures.

description.description: The description of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

merchant_reference.description: The reference generated by the merchant to identify the payment/transaction.

created_at.description: The date and time when the transaction was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time from the last time the transaction was updated.

provider_data.description: Specifies the provider data that processed the payment.

id.description: The provider id that processed the payment.

transaction_id.description: The id of the transaction from the provider.

third_party_transaction_id.description: The id of the transaction from the processor of the provider. If applies.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account (MAX 64; MIN 36).

sub_status.description: The sub_status of the transaction if it applies.

status_detail.description: The status_detail of the transaction if it applies.

response_message.description: Message to provide additional information regarding the operation status.

raw_response.description: The direct response from the provider for the transaction. The format of the object depends on the provider's response.

raw_notification.description: The direct notification from the provider for the transaction. The format of the object depends on the provider's response.

detail.description: Specifies the payment method detail object returned by the provider, which specifies the details of the different transaction category types.

workflow.description: The payment workflow. Indicates whether the integration will use Yuno´s SDK or will be a back to back connection (Card implementation only available for PCI compliant merchants).

callback_url.description: The URL where to redirect the customer after the payment. Only required for DIRECT integrations that have a redirection (MAX 526; MIN 3).

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

fraud_screening.description: Provides information about the fraud scans used for the payment.

status.description: The final status of the screening process of the payment.

created_at.description: The date and time when the fraud screening was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time from the last time the fraud screening was updated.

transactions.description: Specifies the transaction details associated with a screening process of the payment.

id.description: The id of the fraud transaction (MAX 64; MIN 36).

type.description: Type of the fraud transaction.

status.description: The status of the transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3).

response_code.description: The response code of the transaction.

response_message.description: The response message of the transaction.

provider_data.description: Specifies the provider data that processed the payment.

provider_id.description: The id of the fraud prevention provider.

transaction_id.description: The id of the fraud transaction from the provider.

score.description: The provider score for the transaction.

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.
